message:
fix: CI test step working directory

Use subshell for cd worker so npm test runs from project root.

files.patch:
@@ -43,7 +43,6 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Start dev server and run tests
         run: |
-          cd worker && npx wrangler dev --port 8787 &
+          (cd worker && npx wrangler dev --port 8787) &
           sleep 5
-          cd ..
           npm test
